output.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(status) = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(status) = 'inactive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inactive_count
  FROM enrollments
)
SELECT
  'active' AS status,
  active_count AS count,
  active_count AS active_count,
  inactive_count AS inactive_count,
  CASE WHEN inactive_count = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(1.0 * active_count / inactive_count, 2) END AS active_to_inactive_ratio
FROM counts
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'inactive' AS status,
  inactive_count AS count,
  active_count AS active_count,
  inactive_count AS inactive_count,
  CASE WHEN inactive_count = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(1.0 * active_count / inactive_count, 2) END AS active_to_inactive_ratio
FROM counts;

payload.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(status) = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(status) = 'inactive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inactive_count
  FROM enrollments
)
SELECT
  'active' AS status,
  active_count AS count,
  active_count AS active_count,
  inactive_count AS inactive_count,
  CASE WHEN inactive_count = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(1.0 * active_count / inactive_count, 2) END AS active_to_inactive_ratio
FROM counts
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'inactive' AS status,
  inactive_count AS count,
  active_count AS active_count,
  inactive_count AS inactive_count,
  CASE WHEN inactive_count = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(1.0 * active_count / inactive_count, 2) END AS active_to_inactive_ratio
FROM counts;
